title: helianthus debilis
intro: Helianthus debilis, also known as the Asian sunflower, is a type of flowering plant native to East Asia. The plant's roots, leaves, and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Helianthus debilis include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and improving digestion. The plant is commonly prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
